title: Lowvana Life Highyaga Lyrics Vadacurry Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Lowvana Life Highyaga
Singer(s): Anirudh, Andrea Jeremiah
Movie: Vadacurry
Music: Vivek Shiva and Mervin Solomo
Lyrics: Harish

Lowvana Life Highyaga
no enbadhellaam yessaaga aanadhe.
Slow aana time-u speedaaga maaripoche
blank-aana space-u fullaaga aanadhe.

Po paaren nee pala pengal pinnaadi
naan sugavaasi un munnaadi.

Vaa nee en raani
coolugu beeraa nee
aadi paaren de en munnadi.

its sunny on my lips
its sunny on my hips
its sunny on my lips its sunny,
its sunny in the day
its sunny in the night
its sunny all the ways
say sunny

its sunny on my lips
its sunny on my hips
its sunny on my lips
its sunny, its sunny in the day
its sunny in the night
its sunny all the ways
say shit that booty maama

Ye gold-um illa silver-illa
naanum inga enna panna.
Diamond vacha platinatha
senji vachen di

Ye danceum illa stepum illa
naanum inga enna panna.
Sokka vaikkum tips konjam
solli thaayen de.

Ada koothu nee aadi vittu vaada
vanavil oru kottaikkul adaithu vittu poda
ada fittaana paiyyan neethaan vaada
adhukull ippa hittaana songu edhu podaa

Ayyayyo ammaadi, thangamthaan un meni
ottaama orsaaama unna naanum katti kolla vaa.

its sunny on my lips
its sunny on my hips
its sunny on my lips its sunny,
its sunny in the day
its sunny in the night
its sunny all the ways
say sunny

Hey hottumilla beatumilla
naanum inga enna panna.
.. thottu paarthu ok sollenda
.. place-umilla
naanum inga enna panna
saaputuputtu thanga oru kudisai thaayen danceum

Yaelu kadalu thaandi vaa nee
Ellaikku naanthaanadi saamy
Oru nightula setttaachu
life fullaa kickaachu once more
sollitu enna neeyum thooki poyenda.

sunny baby weightu
sunny kutti whiteu
sunny chellam vandhaale
nightu aaagum brightu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Lowvana Life Highyaga conveys a joyful and carefree attitude towards life, celebrating love and happiness.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Vadacurry, highlighting moments of fun and romance between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anirudh and Andrea Jeremiah, both renowned artists in the Tamil music industry.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Lowvana Life Highyaga was composed by Vivek Shiva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Lowvana Life Highyaga, the lively beats and playful lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of youth and love. The song captures the essence of celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties and joyful gatherings. As the characters in Vadacurry navigate their romantic journey, this track serves as a backdrop to their vibrant interactions. The collaboration between Anirudh and Andrea Jeremiah adds a unique charm, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lowvana Life Highyaga from Vadacurry is a vibrant celebration of life and love, featuring the dynamic vocals of Anirudh and Andrea Jeremiah. This upbeat track, infused with catchy rhythms and playful lyrics, is sure to get you moving. Experience the unique collaboration that brings a fresh energy to the Tamil music scene!
stanzaMeanings: Low life is just a way of saying everything is slow. Time has changed from slow to fast, and the empty space is now full.
Look, I see many girls behind you, and I am happy in front of you.
Come, you are my queen, don't be shy, look at me in front of you.
It's sunny on my lips, it's sunny on my hips, it's sunny all day and night, just say sunny.
It's sunny on my lips, it's sunny on my hips, it's sunny all day and night, just say that booty is nice.
I don't have gold or silver, what can I do here? I have diamonds and platinum, that's enough for me.
I don't have dance moves or steps, what can I do here? Just give me some tips, mom.
Hey, dance and show off, in the sky, just let it go, you are the one who can dance, now play that hit song.
Oh my mother, your beauty is like gold, I will also come and join you.
It's sunny on my lips, it's sunny on my hips, it's sunny all day and night, just say sunny.
Hey, I have no beat or rhythm, what can I do here? Just look and say okay... I have no place, what can I do here? Just eat and dance, mom.
Come across the sea, you are everything to me. One night has changed everything, life is fully exciting, just say you will go away.
Sunny baby, you are light, sunny little one, when you come, the night becomes bright.
